shared_properties: Core palette #535353/#F7F7F7/#FF0000 duplicated in this file.
Side-profile T-Rex body silhouette with 2px outline.
differences: Two running frames alternate hind-leg contact at 12 fps.
Tail tip shifts within a 2 px horizontal band.
Both frames keep the feet planted on the ground baseline.

reference_images.label: player
reference_images.purpose: Ground the dinosaur body proportions and pose silhouettes.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_4/art_000002.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by art_000002.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Drive frame changes from a repeating Timer component that advances atlas index values in FixedUpdate.

context.usage: Used during grounded gameplay while the obstacle field scrolls from 300 px/s to 900 px/s.

shape.silhouette: Side-profile running dinosaur with grounded feet and forward-facing head.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 176x94 px with 2 frames.
Animation playback runs at 12 fps with stable whole-pixel frame alignment and no anti-aliasing.
Visible pixels use only the hex colors listed in specs.colors_hex plus transparency.
